description:
Legal record (#11) in a court register/pinqas from a beit din in Cairo (on f. 1v of T-S K22.27). In Hebrew with some terms in Judaeo-Arabic. Location: Cairo. Dated 16 Adar I 5453, which is 1693 CE. 

Left side of bifolio, 1r: (Document #11) Incomplete rental agreement between Yom Ṭov ____[surname missing] and Yaʿacov b. Ḥayyīm Reuʾben, who has the communal titles Gabbay and Rosh Mishmera. The rental agreement is for a two-part property and usage of certain contents most of which are explained in Judaeo-Arabic rather than Hebrew: an upper-story apartment (עלייה) and a ṭayāra (טייארה), which may have been some kind of animal enclosure, perhaps an aviary for raising birds. This reading is based on the Badawi & Hinds Egyptian Arabic Dictionary's entry for the word طيّارة, "temporary animal pen in a field." The ṭayāra is depicted as having arches קנאטר/قناطر inside of it and "movable windows" (שבאביך נקאלי/شبابيك نقالي). The mention of a "movable cupboard/cabinet" (כזאנה נקאלי/خزانة نقالي) may also reference the contents of the ṭayāra rather than the upper-story apartment (עלייה). For the word "נקאלי/نقالي" see also: Badawi & Hinds, 883. The later lines of the entry mention the ketubba of Yom Ṭov's wife Raḥma, in connection with the transaction. MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#11) בפנקס בית דין בקהיר (T-S K22.27, דף 1v); בעברית עם מונחים יהודית-ערבית; ט"ז אדר א' ה'תנ"ג (1693 לספירה); הסכם שכירות חלקי לנכס דו-חלקי: עלייה (דירת קומה עליונה) וטַיַּארָה (אולי לול לעופות); הטייארה מכילה קשתות ('קנאטר') וחלונות נייחים; הכתובה של אשת יום טוב רחמה מוזכרת בקשר לעסקה
